<!DOCTYPE html>
<!--
/*--------------------------------------------------
  レイアウトID   : 1

  基本骨格となるhtml
  ・基本的にはこのデータをいつも利用する
  ・既存のコーディング済みページのhtml（head、body直下のdivやclassの指定）を利用したいといった
    個別のhtml構造を使用する場合に新しいレイアウトを追加する

  実装では…
  ・DBに格納されたレイアウトレコードを読み出し
  ・DBに格納されたレイアウトではinclude部分は置換タグ
  --------------------------------------------------*/
-->
<html lang="ja">
<head>
  <!-- 共通メタ -->
  
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <title>西川物産図鑑 | 西川物産株式会社</title>
        <link rel="shortcut icon" href="/upload/save/common/99b2dbcb43ce17b23eee94c1b3064981.ico">
        <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/upload/save/common/90a27399ee0c2a3c8ae0763e6189cd7d.png" sizes="180x180">
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/upload/save/common/90a27399ee0c2a3c8ae0763e6189cd7d.png" sizes="192x192">
        <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,user-scalable=yes,maximum-scale=1">
        <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no">
        <meta name="keywords" content="">
        <meta name="description" content="自動車関連部品、土木・住宅関連製品、化粧用スポンジパフ、ゴム成型用金型等、幅広い分野からの多様なニーズに貢献することで成長してまいりました。">
        
        

        <link rel="stylesheet" href="//cdn.jsdelivr.net/normalize/3.0.3/normalize.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="//fonts.googleapis.com/earlyaccess/notosansjapanese.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="//fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Lato|Oswald|Roboto|Oxygen:400,700&display=swap">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="/front/assets/css/import.css">

          <script src="//ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/2.1.4/jquery.min.js"></script>
        

  <!-- 共通css -->
  <style>
/*  begin parts css..  parts_id : 3668  */
.tm1_pt1 .header {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  left: 0;
  padding: 0 16px;
  z-index: 100;
  transition: .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-fixed {
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-open {
  background: #FFE804;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-inner {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  height: 100px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.tm1_pt1 .logo {
  margin: 0 28px 0 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .logo a {
  display: block;
  width: 242px;
  height: 24px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .logo a img {
  vertical-align: top;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-left-txt {
  font-family: 'Abril Fatface', cursive;
  font-size: 14px;
  transform: translateY(2px);
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-right-txt {
  padding: 0 24px 0 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-right-txt a {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-right-txt a:after {
  content: "";
  display: inline-block;
  width: 15px;
  height: 12px;
  background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml;base64,);
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  margin: 0 0 0 8px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu {
  position: relative;
  padding: 0 0 0 24px;
  border-left: 1px solid #222;
  z-index: 300;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-open .header-menu {
  border: none;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu-inner {
  position: relative;
  width: 32px;
  height: 18px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu-inner span {
  position: absolute;
  width: 32px;
  height: 2px;
  background: #222;
  transition: .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(1) {
  top: 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(2) {
  top: 8px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(3) {
  bottom: 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-open .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(1) {
  top: 8px;
  transform: rotate(45deg);
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-open .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(2) {
  opacity: 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .header.is-open .header-menu-inner span:nth-of-type(3) {
  bottom: 8px;
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
}

.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 120px 16px 80px;
  background: #FFE804;
  transform: translateX(100%);
  transition: .3s;
  z-index: 200;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu.is-open {
  transform: translateX(0);
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-wrap {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-inner {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-left {
  position: relative;
  width: 37.983706720977594%;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-img {
  margin: 0 0 80px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-left-item a {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-btn a {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 254px;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  background: #1EA7A2;
  border: 1px solid #1EA7A2;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-btn a:after {
  content: "";
  display: inline-block;
  width: 15px;
  height: 12px;
  background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml;base64,);
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  margin: 0 0 0 16px;
  transition: .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-right {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  width: 56.73%;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item {
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item:last-of-type {
  margin: 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item a {
  text-decoration: none;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item-ttl-en {
  font-family: 'Abril Fatface', cursive;
  font-size: 36px;
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item-ttl-en span {
  background: linear-gradient(#222, #222) 0 100%/0 1px no-repeat;
  transition: background .3s;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-item-ttl-ja {
  font-weight: 700;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-li {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 24px 0 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-item {
  position: relative;
  width: 48.18%;
  padding: 0 0 0 18px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-item:nth-of-type(n+3) {
  margin: 16px 0 0;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-item:before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 0;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 10px;
  height: 1px;
  background: #222;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-item a {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.tm1_pt1 .hbg-menu-under-item a span {
  background: linear-gradient(#222, #222) 0 100%/0 1px no-repeat;
  transition: background .3s;
}

@media screen and (min-width: 768px) {
.tm1_pt1   .header-right-txt a:hover {
    color: #1EA7A2;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-btn a:hover {
    color: #1EA7A2;
    background: #fff;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-btn a:hover:after {
    background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml;base64,);
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-item a:hover .hbg-item-ttl-en span {
    background-size: 100% 1px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-under-item a:hover span {
    background-size: 100% 1px;
  }
}

@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
.tm1_pt1   .header-inner {
    height: 64px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .logo {
    margin: 0 8px 0 0;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .logo a {
    width: 151px;
    height: 15px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .header-left-txt {
    transform: translateY(3px);
  }
.tm1_pt1   .header-menu {
    border: none;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .header-right-txt {
    display: none;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .header-menu-inner span {
    width: 24px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .header.is-open .header-menu-inner span {
    background: #364246;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu {
    top: 64px;
    padding: 24px 16px 64px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-inner {
    display: block;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-left {
    width: auto;
    margin: 0 0 40px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-left-item {
    margin: 0 0 16px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-img {
    text-align: center;
    margin: 0 0 40px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-btn {
    position: static;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-btn a {
    display: block;
    width: auto;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-right {
    display: block;
    width: auto;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-under-li {
    display: block;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-item:last-of-type {
    margin: 0 0 40px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-item-ttl-en {
    font-size: 40px;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-under-item {
    width: auto;
  }
.tm1_pt1   .hbg-menu-under-item + .hbg-menu-under-item {
    margin: 16px 0 0;
  }
}body {
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: #222;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-family: 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif;
}
body.is-fixed {
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index :1
}
a {
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: .3s;
}
a:hover {
  text-decoration: none;
  opacity: 1;
}
img {
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}
h1,
h2,
h3,
h4,
h5,
h6 {
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.page-content-width {
  width: auto;
  max-width: 1100px;
}
.recruit:not(#page-1176) .main-container {
  margin-top: 160px;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 1100px) {
  .page-content-width {
    margin: 0 16px !important;
  }
}

@media screen and (max-width: 896px) {
  .pc-only {
    display: block !important;
  }
  .sp-only {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  body {
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .pc-only {
    display: none !important;
  }
  .sp-only {
    display: block !important;
  }
  a {
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }
  .recruit:not(#page-1176) .main-container {
    margin-top: 104px;
  }
  .page-content-width {
    margin: 0 16px !important;
  }
  .page-content-width .page-content-width {
    margin: 0 16px;
  }
}

.template-section-wrapper.tm-wrp1 {display: flex;margin: auto;}
.template-section.tm1.template-section-left {width: 0%;}
.template-section.tm1.template-section-center {width: 100%;}
.template-section.tm1.template-section-right {width: %;}


/*  begin parts css..  parts_id : 3879  */
.tm2_pt2 .book {
  position: relative;
  padding: 0 16px;
  margin: 0 0 120px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-inner {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box {
  position: relative;
  background: #F3F3F3;
  padding: 56px 48px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box:before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
  width: 100px;
  height: 40px;
  background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml;base64,);
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box:after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  left: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
  width: 100px;
  height: 40px;
  background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml;base64,);
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}
.tm2_pt2 .ttl {
  position: absolute;
  top: -48px;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 5;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-head {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-direction: row-reverse;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .col-2 {
  width: 48.01%;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-ttl {
  font-family: 'Poppins', serif;
  font-size: 36px;
  font-weight: 900;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-ttl span {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: 'Abril Fatface', serif;
  font-size: 36px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin: 0 12px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-subttl {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: -12px 0 24px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-profile {
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-profile-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-profile-item + .book-profile-item {
  margin: 8px 0 0;
}
.tm2_pt2 .num {
  display: inline-flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  font-family: 'Poppins', serif;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 24px;
  border: 1px solid #222;
  border-radius: 100%;
  margin: 0 16px 0 0;
}
.tm2_pt2 .prof-txt {
  display: block;
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 2px 0 0;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-bottom {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-box-about {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-about-img {
  flex: 1;
  margin: 0 12px 0 0;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-about-data {
  flex: 1;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-about-ttl {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-head {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-head-item {
  width: 48.01%;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 32px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-col-1 {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 32px;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-middle {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-middel-block {
  width: 48.01%;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-middel-item {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 32px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .go-to-work {
  padding-bottom: 35px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .specialty {
  padding-top: 36px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-middel-item + .book-detail-middel-item {
  margin: 40px 0 0;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-bottom {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin: 0 0 40px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-bottom-item {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 32px;
}
.tm2_pt2 .book-detail-conclusion {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 32px 40px;
}

/*  begin parts css..  parts_id : 3803  */
.tm3_pt3 .breadcrumb {
  margin: 0 0 72px;
  padding: 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.tm3_pt3 .breadcrumb-inner {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.tm3_pt3 .mod-panel-layout {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  word-spacing: 0;
}
.tm3_pt3 .mod-panel-layout > li {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.tm3_pt3 .breadcrumb li + li:before {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  margin: 0 16px;
  border-top: 2px solid #222;
  border-right: 2px solid #222;
  transform: rotate(45deg);
}
.tm3_pt3 .breadcrumb a {
  color: inherit;
}
.tm3_pt3 .breadcrumb a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
.tm3_pt3   .breadcrumb {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-size: 10px;
  }
.tm3_pt3   .breadcrumb li + li:before {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    margin: 0 8px;
    border-width: 1px;
  }
}

.template-section-wrapper.tm-wrp3 {display: flex;margin: auto;}
.template-section.tm3.template-section-left {width: 0%;}
.template-section.tm3.template-section-center {width: 100%;}
.template-section.tm3.template-section-right {width: %;}


/*  begin parts css..  parts_id : 3760  */
.tm4_pt4 .footer-contact {
  background: #FFE804;
  padding: 0 16px;
}
.tm4_pt4 .footer-contact-inner {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 120px 0;
}
.tm4_pt4 .footer-contact-box {
  position: relative;
  width: 50%;
}

<section class="tm2_pt2 parts-section  page-max-width"><div class="book">
  <div class="book-inner">
    <div class="book-box">
      <h2 class="ttl"><img src="/upload/save/page/1bad9d13de2e047c312a2a90b346292b.png" alt="西川物産図鑑" width="108" height="336"></h2>
      <div class="book-box-head">
        <div class="book-box-img col-2"><img src="/upload/save/page/d5a5805dda30107f5b51238fb5930cae.jpg"  width="482" height="334"></div>
        <div class="book-box-data col-2">
          <div class="book-box-ttl">【<span>nishikawabussan</span>】</div>
          <div class="book-box-subttl">にしかわぶっさん［西川物産］</div>
          <ul class="book-profile">
            <li class="book-profile-item"><span class="num">1</span><span class="prof-txt">知れば知るほど面白い会社</span></li>
            <li class="book-profile-item"><span class="num">2</span><span class="prof-txt">自動車部品や化粧品、鋼材製品やスポンジ製品など、いろいろなものづくりを手がけている</span></li>
            <li class="book-profile-item"><span class="num">3</span><span class="prof-txt">お客様との緻密なコミュニケーションが得意</span></li>
          </ul>
          <div class="book-box-txt">自動車部品から化粧品まで、さまざまなものづくりを手がける西川物産。スタッフやお客様の一声から製品化をするなど知れば知るほど面白い西川物産です。<br />
そんな西川物産にはどんなスタッフがいるのでしょうか...みなさん覗いてみませんか？</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="book-detail-head">
        <div class="book-detail-head-item"><img src="/upload/save/page/13c4fad29ce8e776a8ee4ac73803f03f.png" alt="社員の年齢" width="418" height="305"></div>
        <div class="book-detail-head-item"><img src="/upload/save/page/4b4e70076a302f527ab0e08c386735fa.png" alt="男女比率" width="418" height="299"></div>
      </div>

        <div class="sp-only"><img src="/upload/save/page/51db670ec3d4d597770022c322c333c2.png" alt="職種の割合" width="310" height="392"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="book-detail-middle">

          <div class="book-detail-middel-item"><img src="/upload/save/page/b424572cfaeb00db86c7467c1a5d3926.png" alt="社員はどんな人が多い？" width="418" height="249"></div>
          <div class="book-detail-middel-item"><img src="/upload/save/page/363db0a53e7e6a239ce296d051c91b8b.png" alt="休日の過ごし方" width="418" height="501"></div>

          <div class="book-detail-middel-item specialty"><img src="/upload/save/page/cbf0729b40145f5fa7c0b04cd3c95fb2.png" alt="好きな広島名物は？" width="418" height="287"></div>
          <div class="book-detail-middel-item"><img src="/upload/save/page/796827595c34ac75e45f6ee97efe0d6c.png" alt="西川物産をひとことで表すと" width="418" height="355"></div>

        <!-- パーツ内設定スクリプト --><script>
/*  begin parts js..  parts_id : 3668  */
$(window).on("load scroll", function () {
  if ($(this).scrollTop() > 0) {
    $(".header").addClass("is-fixed");
  }
  if ($(this).scrollTop() < 10) {
    $(".header").removeClass("is-fixed");
  }
});

$(function(){
  var spnav = ".hbg-menu";
  $(".header-menu").on("click", function() {
    if($(spnav).hasClass("is-close")) {
      $('.header').addClass("is-open");
      $(this).addClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).addClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).removeClass("is-close");
      /*if(!$(spnav).hasClass("open-type-full")) {
        $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeIn();
      } else {
        $(spnav).fadeIn();
      }*/
      bodyFix();
    } else {
      $('.header').removeClass("is-open");
      $(this).removeClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).removeClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).addClass("is-close");
      /*if (!$(spnav).hasClass("open-type-full")) {
        $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeOut();
      } else {
        $(spnav).fadeOut();
      }*/
      bodyFixReset();
    }
  });
  /*
  $(".js-nav-overlay").on("click", function() {
    $(".menu-icon-before").removeClass("active");
    $(spnav).removeClass("js-open");
    $(spnav).addClass("js-close");
    $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeOut();
    bodyFixReset();
  });
  */
  var scrollPosition;
  function bodyFix() {
    scrollPosition = $(window).scrollTop();
    $("body").css({
      "top": -scrollPosition
    }).addClass("is-fixed");
  }
  function bodyFixReset() {
    $("body").removeAttr("style").removeClass("is-fixed");
    $("html, body").scrollTop(scrollPosition);
  }
});

$(".header-menu").on("click", function() {
  // $(this).toggleClass("is-open");
  // $(".header").toggleClass("is-open");
  // $(".hbg-menu").toggleClass("is-open");
  
});

/*  begin parts js..  parts_id : 3803  */
$('.breadcrumb .mod-panel-layout > li:first-of-type').remove();
</script>
